from my rss feed!

18.jul.26 - gaming log updates: deltarune, silksong, and a new switch 2

recently bought a switch 2 so i added it to the hardware page. and also added log pages for games i am currently playing such as deltarune and silksong

28.jun.26 - doqmeat.com is being reworked + new journal log

i am currently reworking doqmeat.com, there are some pages currently available which i will be linking on the index page but it will take me a while to finish the whole thing. fun fact: this site has 4k files! in the meantime, i've set up an archive over at archive.doqmeat.com in case anyone needs it!

wrote a bit about all of this on my latest journal log.

last updated on 20.jul.26
